# Fast Piggie — Increase Top Speed

**Goal:**
Make the game more challenging by increasing the top speed. The minimum display time for images should decrease more aggressively as rounds progress.

**Instructions:**

- Adjust the timing/speed curve in app/games/fast-piggie/game.js.
- Ensure that after many rounds, the images appear for a very short (but still playable) time.
- Update or add tests in app/games/fast-piggie/tests/ to verify the new speed curve.

**Verification:**

- Play through many rounds: Confirm image display time decreases to a challenging minimum.
- All tests pass with 100% function coverage.
